AddTbspAreaBlocking.ip: Protected object IP address of the DDoS enhanced protection package
AddTbspAreaBlocking.blockTime: Area blocking duration (unit: minutes), min 30, max 1440, required when adding fixed-duration area blocking
AddTbspAreaBlocking.blockType: Blocking type: fixedDuration (fixed duration) or systemDetermines (system determined), defaults to fixedDuration if not specified
